beer.beer_description: This tasty brew is our take on the classic Dortmunder Export style, a beer born in the industrial streets of 1870s Dortmund. Naturally carbonated and conditioned, this smooth, well-balanced lager pours a pale amber colour and comes in at a respectable 5.3%. Czech Saaz and Pacific Jade hops bring it all home with a clean lingering bitterness that’ll leave you wanting more! Pairs well with a freshly baked pretzel. Prost!
